model_specification_line: result = smf.wls("full_time ~ eligible:post + C(year) + C(statefip) + C(birthyr) + UNEMP", data=model_df, weights=model_df["perwt"]).fit(cov_type="cluster", cov_kwds={"groups": model_df["statefip"]})
treatment_definition: 1 if (birthyr >= 1982 and yrimmig <= 2007 and (yrimmig - birthyr) <= 15) else 0
